curation_notes: Re-curated with improved hints. The advisory explicitly names the vulnerable function and file. The patch modifies only sip/response.go, adding a nil check on the To header before accessing its Params map in NewResponseFromRequest. No sibling files share the same vulnerable pattern — grep for .To(). in non-test sip/ files shows only the single instance in response.go. Location derived from advisory description and confirmed by single-file patch diff. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 matches, and the fix is a nil check guard.
